category_sources: source_facts.description says minimalistic hexadecimal editor for scripts; official GitHub repository describes it as a minimalistic commandline hexadecimal editor.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ired; official GitHub repository is radare/ired and README heading expands IRED.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents commands, portability, and project purpose; repository also includes manpage files ired.1 and vired.1.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/radare/ired, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says hexadecimal editor designed for scripts; official README lists command-line editing commands and describes it as a commandline hexadecimal editor.
